description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed female figure holding a bundle of wheat in her left arm and additional sheaves in her right hand. The figure is dressed in flowing, classical-style garments with detailed folds and a head covering, suggesting a pastoral or agrarian theme. The facial features are soft and downcast, with the head slightly bowed, conveying a sense of humility or contemplation. The wheat sheaves are intricately carved, adding texture and realism to the piece. The sculpture stands on a simple, rounded base, and the overall finish is matte with subtle surface variations. The material appears to be white marble or a similar stone, giving the sculpture a timeless, elegant appearance.
description: A white marble sculpture of a robed woman holding wheat sheaves, with detailed drapery and a contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the draped back of the figure and the folds of the robe, with the head covered and wheat sheaves partially visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm holding wheat, and the layered garment details.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the woman's bowed head, facial features, and both arms holding wheat sheaves.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the side of the face, the wheat bundle, and the flowing robe.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
